title: Front Office Manager - Air India SATS - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Air India SATS - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Air India SATS are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Ahmedabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Air India SATS:
Air India SATS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS!
